title: lepyrodia flexuosa
intro: Lepyrodia flexuosa, also known as the fern-leaved pepperbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae. It is native to eastern Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing pain and inflammation. Lepyrodia flexuosa can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional Aboriginal Australian remedies.
